summary: Beat Mates iteration 2 testing complete. Backend: 7/7 tests passed (100%). Frontend: Login, home feed with posts (photo + video), tab bar (6 icons), and create-post screen all working correctly.

issues: Console warnings: expo-av deprecation (use expo-video), shadow* style deprecation (use boxShadow), pointerEvents deprecation - cosmetic warnings

critical_code_review_comments: Video upload endpoint correctly returns media_type='video' for mp4 files
Posts endpoint correctly stores and returns media URLs for both photo and video types
Static file serving at /api/uploads/{filename} working correctly without auth
Create-post screen has loading overlay with 'Pubblicazione in corso...' text
seed_data_creation: Backend tests created TEST_ prefixed photo and video posts for verification
context_for_next_testing_agent: Login requires coordinate-based click at (960, 378) due to React Native Web structure. Direct navigation to protected routes requires login first (session storage). Tab bar has 6 icons (home, create, camera, reels, music, profile). Posts display correctly with video indicator for video posts. Create-post screen shows Foto/Video/Galleria options with Italian UI text.

tested_features.login_flow: PASSED - POST /api/auth/login with mario@test.com/password123 redirects to /home
tested_features.video_upload: PASSED - POST /api/upload with video/mp4 returns {url, filename, media_type: 'video'}
tested_features.photo_post_creation: PASSED - POST /api/posts with type=photo stores media URL correctly
tested_features.video_post_creation: PASSED - POST /api/posts with type=video stores media URL and type correctly
tested_features.get_posts: PASSED - GET /api/posts returns all posts with user info and media URLs
tested_features.frontend_login: PASSED - Login form accepts credentials and navigates to home
tested_features.frontend_home: PASSED - Home shows posts feed with video indicator, stories bar, header
tested_features.frontend_tabbar: PASSED - 6 icons visible (home, create, camera, reels, music, profile)
tested_features.frontend_create_post: PASSED - Create-post screen shows Foto/Video/Galleria options, Pubblica button
